title: encephalartos lanatus
intro: Encephalartos lanatus, also known as the eastern Cape cycad, is a species of plant in the family Zamiaceae, native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Encephalartos lanatus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Encephalartos lanatus can be used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
